name: AuthHandoff
title: Auth Handoff
description: Short-lived, single-use OAuth token handoff for native sign-in. The browser stores the freshly issued token under an unguessable id the app generated; the app claims it by polling. Records live ~2 minutes and are consumed on first claim, which avoids relying on a browser-to-app deep link.

handoff_hash.description: SHA-256 of the raw handoff id; the raw value only ever exists in the app and the browser URL.
